title: Richly Seasoned Mexican Fish Huaraches
description: A mustardy, chewy, comforting Mexican dish featuring fish, served in a banana leaf vessel, made with fish sauce and sous vide cooking method, suitable for satvik friendly diet.
instructions: Preheat the sous vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together fish sauce, mustard paste, lime juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the tilapia fillets to the marinade and coat evenly.
Place the marinated tilapia fillets in a sous vide bag and seal.
Sous vide cook the tilapia for 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the banana leaves by cutting them into squares and washing them with water.
Once the tilapia is cooked, remove it from the bag and place it on the banana leaf squares.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Fold the banana leaves over the tilapia to form a huarache shape and serve immediately.
